zh.lifeSummary: 當John l'Achdecken於大約1306年出生在英國可瓦爾阮 拉尼恩時，他的父親Thomas L' Arcedekne33歲，母親Elizabeth de la Roche28歲。他於1327年12月23日與Cecily De Haccombe結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1370年2月13日在英國可瓦爾塔格爾享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John l'Achdecken于大约1306年出生在英国可瓦爾阮 拉尼恩时，他的父亲Thomas L' Arcedekne33岁，母亲Elizabeth de la Roche28岁。他于1327年12月23日与Cecily De Haccombe结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1370年2月13日在英国可瓦爾塔格爾享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John l'Achdecken was born about 1306, in Ruan Lanihorne, Cornwall, England, his father, Thomas L' Arcedekne, was 33 and his mother, Elizabeth de la Roche, was 28. He married Cecily De Haccombe on 23 December 1327. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 13 February 1370, in Tintagel, Cornwall, England, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John l'Achdecken est né environ 1306, à Ruan Lanihorne, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Thomas L' Arcedekne, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de la Roche, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Cecily De Haccombe le 23 décembre 1327. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 13 février 1370, à Tintagel, Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans.

Dezember 1327 Cecily De Haccombe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. Februar 1370 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Tintagel, Cornwall, England.

Lui sposato Cecily De Haccombe il 23 dicembre 1327. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 13 febbraio 1370, nel Tintagel, Cornwall, England, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John l'Achdeckenが約1306年にイギリスコルンワルルアン ラニホールンで生まれた時，父Thomas L' Arcedekneは33歳，母Elizabeth de la Rocheは28歳であった。1327年12月23日にCecily De Haccombeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1370年2月13日にイギリスコルンワルティンタジェルで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John l'Achdecken(이)가 대략 1306년 영국 코른월 루아 랜이호른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas L' Arcedekne(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de la Roche(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1327년 12월 23일 Cecily De Haccombe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1370년 2월 13일 영국 코른월 틴타걸에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John l'Achdecken nasceu aproximadamente 1306, em Ruan Lanihorne, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas L' Arcedekne, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de la Roche, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecily De Haccombe em 23 de dezembro de 1327. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 13 de fevereiro de 1370, em Tintagel, Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John l'Achdecken родился около 1306 г. в местности руань ланихаурн, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas L' Arcedekne было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de la Roche, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecily De Haccombe 23 декабря 1327 г. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 13 февраля 1370 г. в местности тинтагел, корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 65 лет.
